svg.title: WAN router redundancy — BFD/IP SLA, OOB management, super-WS 100G
svg.desc: 4-port WAN router: WAN1/WAN3 are 10G ISP fiber (active), WAN2/WAN4 are 5G cellular 1G (failover). Router runs BFD + IP SLA. OOB management switch sits beside the router for isolated management. L3 switch uplinks at 10G, 100G to cluster servers. Access switch uplinks at 10G, downstream 10G to workstations and 100G to super-workstations.

g.text: Active / standby per segment — BFD + IP SLA
